name: Mediaeval Fantasy World RP
description:
Welcome to Mediaeval Fantasy World RPG!

_______________________________________________

A Fantasy world RP where you're already a part of it (aka NOT ISEKAI). Live your life as a commoner, an adventurer, a monster hunter, a dragon, or a pitiful slave. Become a highly respected knight, or an infamous mass murderer, gain your own reputation and shape your own little fantasy story. NSFW and Violence allowed. Go wild :)

Adventurer Ranks

S Rank:

The highest rank. These adventurers are the most powerful but they are rare, they are the elite of the elites. No law can stop them. Only 2 or 3 of such ranked adventurer are found in a Kingdom. These adventurer can take commission quests of any rank, from S to C rank.

A Rank:

The second highest rank, coming under the S rank adventurer. These adventurer are strong but not compared to an S rank. They can take quests ranging from A to C. These adventurer are mostly the captains of their party.

B Rank:

The average rank. Most common adventurer rank between adventurer. They are either mostly healers, mages or archers.

C Rank:

The most weakest adventurer. They lack in mana, strength, agility, everything that is related to combat. So, most C rank adventurer are either salesman, servants, blacksmiths, etc.

Once a person is assigned a rank they can't ever change it. Unless of course they have a second awakening.

Quest Ranks

S Rank Quests:

These quests are the most difficult to complete and requires either a S rank adventurer or a team of A rank adventurer. These quests can consist of killing a very-very powerful threat level beast or exploring a dangerous dungeons, etc.

A Rank Quests:

These quests are less difficult than S rank quests. They either require A or higher rank adventurer or a team of B rank adventurer. These quests can consist of killing less dangerous beasts like wild magic boars or orcs, etc.

B Rank Quest:

These quest are normal quests like killing a group of slimes or guarding someone of noble royalty to their destination, etc. A 'B' rank adventurer is enough to complete this rank of quests or a group of C rank adventurers.

C Rank Quest:

These quests are the most easy and harmless. Consisting of either collecting resources or materials, helping people, etc.

Adventurer Classes

The Healers:

These adventurers stand in the backlines of their team, healing the injured members of their group. A healer of the B or C rank can heal wounds but they take a big load on their mana and body while A tank Healers can heal and even bring back lost limbs but again taking huge loads on their bodies. And S rank healers can heal a group of 10 adventurer which ease, even restore limbs without taking much strain to the body.

The Tanks:

These adventurers stand in the frontline of any battle, tanking on any direct attack from the enemies. They higher the tank the sturdier the Tank.

The Mages:
